content:
📜 Renamed: “The Inquiry Chest: A Complaint Box for the Discerning Mind”
✔ Weekly thematic subheadings (e.g., “The Labyrinth of Perception” for Gothic Week).
✔ Daily prompts that evolve based on the week’s themes.
✔ Function: Provides structured metacognition & course feedback.

✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages engagement while letting students voice concerns.
• Meta-structure aligns with literary tropes (e.g., Kafkaesque bureaucracy in a Kafka week).

🎮 2. Skill-Based Checks for Unlockable Abilities

📜 Students must perform a specific skill-based challenge to activate any ability they unlock.

Examples of Unlockable Perks & Their Activation Tests
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 79 (chunk 79/555)
